Welcome to Sehgal Motorsports

A Tradition of Car Quality Since 1979

Sehgal Motorsports is a beacon of confidence and innovation in Pakistan's automotive sector. Founded in 1979 by Nadeem Rafiq Sehgal and now run by Hamid Sehgal, the company has evolved from an individual's dream to a national standard. With years of experience in the industry and an active customer base, we have revolutionised how car services and products are provided.

  • Who We Are

    Four Decades of Trust, Innovation, and Performance

    With a strong presence in Rawalpindi and Islamabad, Sehgal Motorsports has become a household name among car and bike fanatics. We offer Pakistan's first and only private SSS (Sales, Service, Spare Parts) dealership. Our journey is built on a culture of reliability, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of quality, so people all over Pakistan prefer us over any other dealership.

  • Our Services

    Your All-in-One Automotive Hub

    We provide total car solutions at one stop. From new, used & Exchange car sales to specialised services in modification, upgrade, maintenance, and Paint Protection Film (PPF) Installation, our array of services is designed for today's vehicle owners. From facelift conversion to straightforward part replacement, our promise stays the same: no compromise on quality.

What We Offer

  • From Accessories to Upgrades – Everything Under One Roof

    Our extensive product range features:
    With over 15,000 high-quality products and over 150 local and global brands, our catalog guarantees access to the newest automotive innovations, all at affordable prices.

    • Large stock of quality products.
    • Latest accessories from trusted brands
    • Easy nationwide shopping with free delivery
    • Skilled team for expert modifications
    • Pakistan’s only private SSS dealership
    • Up-to-date auto prices and trends
    • Trusted by millions of loyal customers

  • What Makes Us Special

    From a small venture in 1979 to becoming a recognised name across Pakistan, Sehgal Motorsports has grown with one mission: to make car care and customization accessible, affordable, and trusted. Built on decades of passion and experience, and backed by the loyalty of millions, Sehgal Motorsports offers a complete automotive experience—including not just car detailing and accessories, but also established services like used car sales, car exchange, and car flip solutions—making it easier for customers to upgrade, buy, or sell with confidence under one trusted name.

  • Our Online Store

    Sehgalmotorsports.pk – Shop Smarter, Drive Better

    Enjoy fast and secure online shopping at Sehgalmotorsports.pk. With more than 15,000 products on offer, easy navigation, free nationwide shipping, and an easy return policy, we deliver a full-fledged auto store to your screen. Our website also offers real-time auto prices, product suggestions, and new products to assist customers in making the right decision.

  • Why Choose Us

    Trusted by Millions, Recommended by Experts

    From high-end products to customer-centric policies, Sehgal Motorsports has emerged as the go-to option for millions of car owners in Pakistan. One of every two modified vehicles on the road reflects our commitment and reach, supported by an unparalleled online and offline reputation.

Our Reach

  • Serving Across Pakistan with Two Strategic Locations

    Our headquarters are located in Saddar Cantt, Rawalpindi, and our flagship store on GT Road, Islamabad, continues to expand our retail footprint across Pakistan. Alongside premium car care and customization, we offer a complete automotive solution with new car sales, used car sales, and car exchange services, making it easy for customers to buy, sell, or upgrade their vehicles with confidence. Our growing network of branches enables us to deliver speedy, personalized service to thousands of customers every day.

  • Meet the Team

    Skilled Experts Behind Every Modification

    Our experienced crew comprises various specialists, from mechanics and auto electricians to paint specialists and fabricators. Each project, ranging from light detailing to complete body conversion, is executed with technical accuracy and attention to detail.

  • Our Commitment

    Affordable Solutions, Unmatched Quality

    Sehgal Motorsports was built on a commitment to quality at reasonable prices, and that commitment remains to this day. We are dedicated to providing actual value through dependable service, affordable prices, and a customer experience that instills trust with every interaction.

  • Connect With Us

    Join Pakistan's Largest Automotive Community

    Whether you shop online, visit our branches, or keep up with us on social media, Sehgal Motorsports is here to help you stay ahead in your car life. Visit our world of car sales, car care, customization, and quality, relied on by millions nationwide.
